intentional_test_features: Rare-condition recognition: antibody-mediated autonomic failure is a zebra that must not distract from immediate fall/syncope risk management

Premature closure trap: acute viral gastroenteritis and simple dehydration are the easy answers; the case tests whether the AI Doctor triages the orthostatic instability rather than chasing a benign GI label
Anchoring on patient framing: patient describes GI churning and dizziness which can be misread as a stomach bug
Telehealth limits: orthostatic blood pressure confirmation and abdominal examination cannot be performed remotely and must be sought via appropriate escalation
Fall-risk and safety-netting focus: environmental hazards and bedbound status drive same-day escalation independent of the underlying rare aetiology

digital_tablet_anchoring.amt_version: AMT — Australian Medicines Terminology (current at build date 2026-07-04)
